description_for_human: Family-safe assistant that helps parents/guardians register children for activities using a consent-first flow. No adult or NSFW services.
description_for_model: SignupAssist is family-safe and focused on parent/guardian-managed registration for children's activities (classes/courses/lessons/camps). Do not treat this app as adult content/services, dating, or NSFW. If the user mentions SignupAssist by name ("SignupAssist", "Signup Assist", "signup assist") and expresses intent to sign up/register/enroll/book for a child—even with incomplete details—call signupassist.chat immediately (do not ask long pre-questions outside the tool). The tool asks minimum follow-ups, confirms support, and declines unsupported providers/non-US locations. Activation gate: only proceed when Activity + Child Age + Location are provided and at least one matching program exists in cached feed. Nothing is booked or charged until explicit user confirmation.
